title: Mission Critical add-on is now in Public Preview ​
body:
**June 12, 2026**

The [Mission Critical workspace add-on](/aws/en/admin/mission-critical) is now in Public Preview. The add-on unlocks managed disaster recovery and the existing Enhanced Security and Compliance (ESC) capabilities for a single compute rate, and is enabled per workspace from the new **Add-ons** tab in the account console.

Access to the Mission Critical add-on is gated. Contact your Databricks account team to enable the add-on on your account.
